paper_title: Inverse problems for minimal complements and maximal supplements
summary: Question 9 asks for the optimal size threshold below which every non-empty solid subset of a finite abelian group G is guaranteed to be a maximal supplement; Theorem 5 in the source paper establishes the bound O((|G|/log|G|)^{1/4}) but the authors note it is unlikely to be optimal. A targeted search across arXiv and the published literature found no follow-up work improving or matching this bound, and the question appears to remain open.

notes: No follow-up papers addressing Question 9 were found after five web searches and fetches. The question concerns the sharpness of the O((|G|/log|G|)^{1/4}) bound in Theorem 5 of arXiv:2006.00534; the source paper itself flags the bound as likely not optimal. Status is open with high confidence given the targeted search and the 5-year gap since publication.
